'''lomawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrantic|quadrantic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrantic|quadrantic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lomawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomawithi|lomawithi]] || [[word:lomawiji|lomawiji]] || [[word:lomawishi|lomawishi]] || [[word:lomawiki|lomawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomawuthuthu|lomawuthuthu]] || [[word:lomawujuju|lomawujuju]] || [[word:lomawushushu|lomawushushu]] || [[word:lomawukuku|lomawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomawuthu|lomawuthu]] || [[word:lomawuju|lomawuju]] || [[word:lomawushu|lomawushu]] || [[word:lomawuku|lomawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomawufthuf|lomawufthuf]] || [[word:lomawufjuf|lomawufjuf]] || [[word:lomawufshuf|lomawufshuf]] || [[word:lomawufkuf|lomawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomawethe|lomawethe]] || [[word:lomaweje|lomaweje]] || [[word:lomaweshe|lomaweshe]] || [[word:lomaweke|lomaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomawothotho|lomawothotho]] || [[word:lomawojojo|lomawojojo]] || [[word:lomawoshosho|lomawoshosho]] || [[word:lomawokoko|lomawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomawotho|lomawotho]] || [[word:lomawojo|lomawojo]] || [[word:lomawosho|lomawosho]] || [[word:lomawoko|lomawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomawofthof|lomawofthof]] || [[word:lomawofjof|lomawofjof]] || [[word:lomawofshof|lomawofshof]] || [[word:lomawofkof|lomawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfthÃŸf|lomawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfjÃŸf|lomawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfshÃŸf|lomawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfkÃŸf|lomawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lomawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lomawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lomawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lomawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfthÃŸf|lomawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfjÃŸf|lomawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfshÃŸf|lomawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfkÃŸf|lomawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfthÃŸf|lomawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfjÃŸf|lomawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfshÃŸf|lomawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lomawÃŸfkÃŸf|lomawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomawÃḊthÃḊ|lomawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lomawÃḊjÃḊ|lomawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lomawÃḊshÃḊ|lomawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lomawÃḊkÃḊ|lomawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomawathatha|lomawathatha]] || [[word:lomawajaja|lomawajaja]] || [[word:lomawashasha|lomawashasha]] || [[word:lomawakaka|lomawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomawatha|lomawatha]] || [[word:lomawaja|lomawaja]] || [[word:lomawasha|lomawasha]] || [[word:lomawaka|lomawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomawafthaf|lomawafthaf]] || [[word:lomawafjaf|lomawafjaf]] || [[word:lomawafshaf|lomawafshaf]] || [[word:lomawafkaf|lomawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lomawasha|lomawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomawshÃḋsha|lomawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomawrosha|lomawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomawmusha|lomawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomawyasha|lomawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomawnkshÃḋsha|golomawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomawnkrosha|golomawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomawnkmusha|golomawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomawnkyasha|golomawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lomamawasha|lomamawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomamawshÃḋsha|lomamawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomamawrosha|lomamawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomamawmusha|lomamawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomamawyasha|lomamawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomamawnkshÃḋsha|golomamawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomamawnkrosha|golomamawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomamawnkmusha|golomamawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomamawnkyasha|golomamawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lemÃḊwasha|lemÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lemÃḊwshÃḋsha|lemÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lemÃḊwrosha|lemÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lemÃḊwmusha|lemÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lemÃḊwyasha|lemÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golemÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|golemÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golemÃḊwnkrosha|golemÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golemÃḊwnkmusha|golemÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golemÃḊwnkyasha|golemÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lomfawasha|lomfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomfawshÃḋsha|lomfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomfawrosha|lomfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomfawmusha|lomfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomfawyasha|lomfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomfawnkshÃḋsha|golomfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomfawnkrosha|golomfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomfawnkmusha|golomfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomfawnkyasha|golomfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
